title: Foreign Exchange Turnover Data: April 27, 2026 – April 30, 2026
description: The Reserve Bank of India today released the data showing daily merchant and Inter-Bank transactions in foreign exchange for the period April 27, 2026 – April 30, 2026. All Figures are in USD Millions Position Date MERCHANT INTER BANK FCY / INR FCY / FCY FCY / INR FCY / FCY Spot Forward Cancellation of Forwards Spot Forward Cancellation of Forwards Spot Swap Forward Spot Swap Forward Purchases 27-04-2026 6,073 1,655 1,720 347 571 567 14,795 26,147 2,272 7,264 2,627 294 28-04-2026 6,789 4,1
